title: Employee Salary and Department Analyzer
category: Scanner, Methods, If-Else, Switch, Exception Handling
description: Create a simple Java console-based application that analyzes an employee's salary level, service status, and department name.

easy.summary: Input employee name, monthly salary, and department code. Display salary level and department name.
requirements: Use clear input prompts, for example Enter Employee Name:, Enter Monthly Salary:, and Enter Department Code:.
Display the required output values clearly after all inputs are processed.
Ask for employee name, monthly salary, and department code.
Determine the salary level using getSalaryLevel(double salary).
Determine the department name using getDepartmentName(String departmentCode).
Use if-else for salary level and switch for department code.

medium.summary: Add years of service and display service status.
requirements: Add an input for years of service.
Display years of service and service status.
Add years of service as a new input.
Determine the service status using getServiceStatus(int years).

hard.summary: Display the complete employee salary and department result.
requirements: Display the final output clearly and consistently.
Display the complete employee salary and department result.
Display the complete employee salary and department result after all inputs are entered.
Include employee name, salary level, years of service, service status, department code, and department name.
Handle invalid salary and years-of-service values properly.
